testcase.name: test_story_ideas_expanded_content

failure.message: assert 'story_ideas' in {'access': {'has_full_access': False, 'purchased_genres': []}, 'age_groups': ['3-5', '4-6', '5-7', '6-8'], 'genres': ['Adventure', 'Educational', 'Emotional Growth', 'Family', 'Fantasy', 'Friendship', ...], 'ideas': [{'age_group': '4-6', 'brief_synopsis': 'A young detective must solve the case of the missing cookies before dinner.', 'characters': [{'description': 'A 5-year-old detective with a magnifying glass', 'name': 'Detective Danny', 'type': 'Protagonist'}, {'description': 'The cookie baker who discovered the crime', 'name': 'Mom', 'type': 'Supporting'}, {'description': "Claims he didn't do it", 'name': 'Dad', 'type': 'Suspect'}, {'description': 'The usual suspect', 'name': 'Biscuit the Dog', 'type': 'Suspect'}, {'description': 'Too small to reach... or is she?', 'name': 'Baby Sister', 'type': 'Suspect'}], 'created_at': '2026-02-27T12:58:22.344468+00:00', ...}, {'age_group': '3-5', 'brief_synopsis': 'A snowman wishes to see summer and his animal friends try to make his dream come true.', 'characters': [{'description': 'A curious snowman who dreams of summer', 'name': 'Frosty', 'type': 'Protagonist'}, {'description': 'The idea maker of the group', 'name': 'Felix Fox', 'type':...27T12:58:22.344453+00:00', ...}, {'age_group': '4-6', 'brief_synopsis': 'A child discovers their closet monster is actually lonely and just wants to play.', 'characters': [{'description': 'A brave little boy who faces his fears', 'name': 'Leo', 'type': 'Protagonist'}, {'description': 'A purple monster who just wants a friend', 'name': 'Grum', 'type': 'Main Character'}, {'description': "Parents who can't see Grum", 'name': 'Mom and Dad', 'type': 'Supporting'}, {'description': 'A talking flashlight', 'name': 'Flashlight Fred', 'type': 'Comic Relief'}], 'created_at': '2026-02-27T12:58:22.344449+00:00', ...}, {'age_group': '5-7', 'brief_synopsis': 'A girl shrinks to the size of an ant and discovers the amazing world of insects.', 'characters': [{'description': 'A curious girl who was scared of bugs', 'name': 'Sarah', 'type': 'Protagonist'}, {'description': 'A hardworking ant who offers to help', 'name': 'Andy', 'type': 'Guide'}, {'description': 'A beautiful butterfly who gives advice', 'name': 'Bella', 'type': 'Supporting'}, {'description': 'A spider who is actually friendly', 'name': 'Webster', 'type': 'Supporting'}], 'created_at': '2026-02-27T12:58:22.344444+00:00', ...}, ...], ...}

testcase.name: test_content_vault_api_exists_or_redirects
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_security_and_expanded_content_iteration93.py:381: in test_content_vault_api_exists_or_redirects assert response.status_code in [200, 301, 302, 404] E assert 401 in [200, 301, 302, 404] E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_api_root
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_security_and_expanded_content_iteration93.py:483: in test_api_root assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
